languages.text: "По пути сюда я виде{mf|л|ла} несколько очень необычных механизмов. Это и есть творения еретиков?"

traits.locale_text: "По пути сюда я виде{mf|л|ла} несколько очень необычных механизмов. Это и есть творения еретиков?"

languages.text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"
languages.original_text: "По пути сюда я виде{mf|л|ла} несколько очень необычных механизмов. Это и есть творения еретиков?"

traits.locale_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"
"I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"
"I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

languages.text: 「ここへ来る途中、いくつかの非常に珍しい機構に気づいた。これは異端者の作ったものか？」
languages.original_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

traits.locale_text: 「ここへ来る途中、いくつかの非常に珍しい機構に気づいた。これは異端者の作ったものか？」

languages.text: "Buraya gelirken son derece sıra dışı mekanizmalar fark ettim. Bunlar kâfirlerin icatları mı?"
languages.original_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

traits.locale_text: "Buraya gelirken son derece sıra dışı mekanizmalar fark ettim. Bunlar kâfirlerin icatları mı?"

languages.text: «Por el camino me he fijado en varios mecanismos de aspecto poco común. ¿Son obra de los herejes?».
languages.original_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

traits.locale_text: «Por el camino me he fijado en varios mecanismos de aspecto poco común. ¿Son obra de los herejes?».

languages.text: “我一路上注意到几个极不寻常的机械装置。那些是异端造物吗？”
languages.original_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

traits.locale_text: “我一路上注意到几个极不寻常的机械装置。那些是异端造物吗？”

languages.text: « J'ai remarqué en chemin un certain nombre de mécanismes des plus inhabituels. S'agit-il de créations des hérétiques ? »
languages.original_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai remarqué en chemin un certain nombre de mécanismes des plus inhabituels. S'agit-il de créations des hérétiques ? »

languages.text: "Mir sind auf dem Weg hierher einige ungewöhnliche Mechanismen aufgefallen. Sind sie das Werk von Ketzern?"
languages.original_text: "I noticed several highly unusual mechanisms on my way here. Are they the heretics' creations?"

traits.locale_text: "Mir sind auf dem Weg hierher einige ungewöhnliche Mechanismen aufgefallen. Sind sie das Werk von Ketzern?"
